title: The Second Memory
objective: Witness the sword's second memory — the betrayer who broke the world

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The second memory. The first wielder is dead — his empire broke. The sword passed to a betrayer. He used it to shatter the world the king had forged.

dialogue.speaker: PRIEST
dialogue.text: The sword remembers the betrayer. It was made to remember. That is the prophecy — that the sword would find a wielder who would end what the betrayer started.

dialogue.speaker: BETRAYER
dialogue.text: I broke the world because the world was a lie. The sword was the only truth. I wonder, Jin — do you have the strength to break it again?

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The second memory fades. The betrayer is dead in the sword's memory. The world is not a lie — I will not break it. I will keep it.
